calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Order To Impose Personal Liability On Third Party, Lahela Cleaning & Maintenance Services,Inc. For Judgment; Request For Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Assignee Creditors Trade Association's motion to impose personal liability is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Assignee Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Request for Production of Documents granted.
a. All objections to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One], and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One]-except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges-are waived;
b. Judgment Debtor shall provide full, complete and verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One] and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] within 20 days of the date of this Order.
2. Assignee Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Request for sanctions granted in the sum of $300.00;
a. Order for sanctions stayed for 20 days from date of this Order;
b. If full, complete and verified responses to Judgment Creditor's Post-Judgment Demand For Production of Documents [Set One] and Post-Judgment Interrogatories [Set One] within 20 days as ordered, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
